_comment: Public Finance Data — Master Manifest. Fetch this file first. Compare versions to cached local copies to determine what needs refreshing.
_migration_note: Schema 2.0 restructured all file paths. Consumers on schema 1.x must update their fetchManifest() to use new paths. See schema-changelog.md for migration details.

rates_annual.description: TSP limits, IRMAA tiers, IRA limits, SS bend points, pay cap, FERS parameters, federal tax brackets, planning assumption defaults
rates_annual.changelog_2026_2: Restructure: removed va and vgli sections (moved to federal/veterans-affairs/). No data values changed.

pay_tables.description: GS base pay tables — 11-year history (2016-2026), locality percentages, DCIPS cross-reference

dcips_pay_tables.description: DCIPS compensation: base GG grades, pay bands, LMS locality rates, TLMS supplements (STEM/Cyber, 780th MIB, Hawaii IT, Pilots, Polygraphers, Foreign Area)
dcips_pay_tables.changelog_2026_1: Initial release. Complete 2026 DCIPS pay structure with all TLMS categories.

va_compensation.description: VA disability compensation rates by rating with dependent additions, DIC rates, VA COLA
va_compensation.changelog_2026_1: Extracted from rates-annual.json during schema 2.0 restructure. All values unchanged.

vgli.description: Veterans Group Life Insurance age-banded premium table
vgli.changelog_2026: Extracted from rates-annual.json during schema 2.0 restructure. All values unchanged.

fehb_rates.description: FEHB premium rates — complete 132-plan dataset (19 nationwide FFS + 459 regional HMO entries) from OPM Excel files

medicare_rates.description: Medicare Parts A, B, D premiums, IRMAA brackets, deductibles, coinsurance, premium history. Includes 26-year Part B premium and Part A deductible history (2001-2026).
medicare_rates.changelog_2026_1: Initial release. Complete 2026 CMS data with all IRMAA filing status brackets.

state_benefits.description: State and territory income tax treatment, veteran property tax benefits, and vehicle personal property tax exemptions for 56 jurisdictions (50 states + DC + 5 US territories: AK, AL, AR, AS, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, GU, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MP, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, PR, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VI, VT, WA, WI, WV, WY)
changelog: v2.1: Added 5 US territories (AS, GU, MP, PR, VI) — territory expansion with income tax, real estate, and vehicle property tax separation
state_benefits.changelog_2_9: v2.9: Legislation watch refresh (all 8 bills checked 2026-03-15). MN HF194 author Rasmusson added. MD HB 857 MACo opposition noted. No bills advanced since Session 39.
state_benefits.changelog_2_10: v2.10: Session 56 legislation watch refresh. All 8 tracked bills checked. No bills advanced. MD HB 761 (Keep Our Heroes Home Act) added as companion to HB 857. MD session context added (sine die 4/13, $1.4B deficit). All last_checked dates refreshed to 2026-03-23.

vrs_plans.description: Virginia Retirement System (VRS) — Plan 1, Plan 2, Hybrid DB+DC, SPORS, VaLORS, enhanced hazardous duty, COLA formulas, health insurance credit, hazardous duty supplement
vrs_plans.changelog_2_0_0: Split from plan-library.json during schema 2.0 restructure. VRS plans only. All values unchanged.

other_db_template.description: Generic defined benefit plan template for user-entered pension parameters

static_refs.description: SS Full Retirement Age table, IRS RMD Uniform Lifetime Table, OPM locality area codes

tsp_limits.description: TSP contribution limits history 1987-2026: elective deferral, catch-up, super catch-up (60-63), annual additions limit
tsp_limits.changelog_1_0: Initial release. 40 years of TSP/401k limit history.

ss_bend_points.description: Social Security PIA bend points history 1979-2026: first and second bend points, PIA replacement factors
ss_bend_points.changelog_1_0: Initial release. 48 years of bend point history.

ss_taxable_max.description: Social Security taxable maximum history 1937-2026: wage base, OASDI rates, max employee tax
ss_taxable_max.changelog_1_0: Initial release. 90 years of taxable maximum history.

ira_limits.description: IRA contribution limits history 1975-2026: contribution limits, catch-up, Roth income phase-outs by filing status (single, married joint, married separate)
ira_limits.changelog_2_0: v2.0: Added Roth income phase-out thresholds by filing status for all years since 1998.

ssa_life_table.description: SSA actuarial period life table: death probabilities, survivor counts, and life expectancy by age (0-119) and sex. 2022 data from 2025 Trustees Report. Includes retirement planning reference ages.
ssa_life_table.changelog_1_0: Initial release. Full 120-age period life table with retirement planning reference.

cola_history.description: Historical COLA percentages 1975-2025 for Social Security, FERS, CSRS, and VA. Includes FERS cap formula and summary statistics.
cola_history.changelog_1_0: Initial release. 51 years of COLA data with computed FERS adjustments.

tricare_rates.description: TRICARE premium, cost-share, pharmacy copay, and dental program schedule — Prime, Select, TFL, TDP, Reserve Select, Retired Reserve, TYA, CHCBP

fehb_plan_benefits.description: FEHB plan benefits — deductibles, OOP max, copays, pharmacy tiers, Medicare coordination for all 132 plans (in-network + out-of-network)

fedvip_rates.description: FEDVIP dental and vision premium rates — 11 dental carriers by rating region, 5 vision carriers nationwide

federal_tax_brackets.description: Federal income tax bracket history 2001-2026: rates and thresholds by filing status (EGTRRA/JGTRRA/ATRA/TCJA eras)
federal_tax_brackets.changelog_1_2: v1.2: Added cross-reference to filing-status-thresholds.json. Updated 2026 notes for OBBBA.

standard_deduction_history.description: Standard deduction history 2001-2026 by filing status with age 65+ additional amounts

capital_gains_rates.description: Long-term capital gains tax rate history 2001-2026 with NIIT thresholds
capital_gains_rates.changelog_1_2: v1.2: Fixed 2026 capital gains thresholds per Rev. Proc. 2025-32. Added HoH and MFS filing statuses. Cross-reference added.

hsa_limits.description: HSA contribution limit history 2004-2026: self-only, family, catch-up, HDHP deductible/OOP requirements

federal_pay_raises.description: Federal civilian (GS) and military annual pay raise percentages 2001-2026

estate_gift_tax.description: Estate tax exemption, top rate, gift annual exclusion, and lifetime exemption history 2001-2026

fers_contribution_rates.description: FERS employee contribution rates by hire-date cohort (FERS 0.8%, RAE 3.1%, FRAE 4.4%), CSRS reference, benefit formula

fehb_premium_history.description: FEHB weighted average premium trend 2006-2026: total and enrollee biweekly premiums with CAGR analysis

rmd_rules_history.description: RMD age thresholds (70.5/72/73/75), SECURE Act rule changes, inherited IRA 10-year rule, penalty history

social_security_claiming.description: SS FRA schedule, early filing reductions, delayed retirement credits, earnings test, WEP/GPO repeal status

military_retirement_rules.description: Military retirement systems (Final Pay, High-3, REDUX, BRS), Chapter 61 disability retirement, SBP, concurrent receipt (CRDP/CRSC) with tax treatment and election logic. Covers all eight uniformed services including USPHS and NOAA Corps.

obbba_tax_provisions.description: One Big Beautiful Bill Act (P.L. 119-21) tax provisions relevant to retirement and financial planning

county_property_tax_az.description: County-level property tax rates and veteran exemption details: Maricopa County (AZ).
county_property_tax_az.changelog_1_1: Restructured from flat states/counties/ into per-state directories. No data changes — structural reorganization only.

county_property_tax_co.description: County-level property tax rates and veteran exemption details: El Paso County (CO).
county_property_tax_co.changelog_1_1: Restructured from flat states/counties/ into per-state directories. No data changes — structural reorganization only.

county_property_tax_fl.description: County-level property tax rates, veteran exemptions, and application info for top retirement and military counties in Florida (Hillsborough, Sarasota, Lee, Collier).
county_property_tax_fl.changelog_1_1: Restructured from flat states/counties/ into per-state directories. No data changes — structural reorganization only.

county_property_tax_md.description: County-level property tax rates and veteran exemption details: Prince George's County (MD).
county_property_tax_md.changelog_1_1: Restructured from flat states/counties/ into per-state directories. No data changes — structural reorganization only.

county_property_tax_nc.description: County-level property tax rates and veteran exemption details: Cumberland County (NC).
county_property_tax_nc.changelog_1_1: Restructured from flat states/counties/ into per-state directories. No data changes — structural reorganization only.

county_property_tax_nv.description: County-level property tax rates and veteran exemption details: Clark County (NV).
county_property_tax_nv.changelog_1_1: Restructured from flat states/counties/ into per-state directories. No data changes — structural reorganization only.

county_property_tax_tx.description: County-level property tax rates and veteran exemption details: Bexar County (TX).
county_property_tax_tx.changelog_1_1: Restructured from flat states/counties/ into per-state directories. No data changes — structural reorganization only.

county_property_tax_va.description: County-level property tax rates and veteran exemption details: Fairfax County, Virginia Beach (VA).
county_property_tax_va.changelog_1_1: Restructured from flat states/counties/ into per-state directories. No data changes — structural reorganization only.

county_property_tax_wa.description: County-level property tax rates and veteran exemption details: Pierce County (WA).
county_property_tax_wa.changelog_1_1: Restructured from flat states/counties/ into per-state directories. No data changes — structural reorganization only.

military_pay_tables.description: Monthly military basic pay by grade and YOS, 2016-2026. Supports High-3 average calculation for military retirement.

erfc_plans_fairfax.description: ERFC supplemental pension parameters: Legacy, 2001 Tier 1, 2001 Tier 2. Fairfax County (FCPS) only. County-level plan under states/virginia/fairfax-county/.
erfc_plans_fairfax.changelog_2_0_0: Split from plan-library.json during schema 2.0 restructure. ERFC plans only. Added jurisdiction metadata. All values unchanged.

plan_combinations_fairfax.description: VRS + ERFC pension stacking patterns for Fairfax County employees. County-level data under states/virginia/fairfax-county/.

acers_plans_arlington.description: ACERS pension plan parameters for Arlington County employees. Independent DB system (not VRS). Covers general, school board, and public safety employees under Chapters 21, 35, and 46 of Arlington County Code.

fcers_plans_fairfax.name: Fairfax County Employees' Retirement System (FCERS) Plans
fcers_plans_fairfax.description: Fairfax County ERS defined benefit pension plan parameters — 5 plan tiers (A-E) for general county and FCPS non-teaching employees. Includes benefit formulas, eligibility rules, contributions, disability, DROP, survivor options.
fcers_plans_fairfax.schema_notes: Independent municipal pension system (not VRS). Plan A/B (pre-2013), C/D (2013-2019), E (2019+). A/C use integrated SS contribution; B/D/E use flat rate.

pors_plans_fairfax.description: Fairfax County Police Officers Retirement System (PORS) pension plan parameters — 3 plan tiers (A-C) based on hire date

urs_plans_fairfax.description: Fairfax County Uniformed Retirement System (URS) pension plan parameters — 4 modeled plan tiers (B, D, E, F) for fire/rescue, sheriff, animal control, public safety communications

rrs_plans_richmond.description: Richmond Retirement System (RRS) pension plan parameters - 8 plan types covering general, sworn, executive, and DC plans. System CLOSED to new members Jan 1, 2024 (VRS transition).

mcerp_plans_montgomery.description: Montgomery County Employee Retirement Plans (MCERP) — ERS (3 DB sub-plans), public safety ERS, GRIP (cash balance), RSP (DC), EOP, DCP. $7.3B system, 16,000 members.
mcerp_plans_montgomery.changelog_2026_2: v2026.2: Public safety Groups E and G fully detailed from SPDs. Group F partial. COLA, DROP, early retirement, contributions, disability.
mcerp_plans_montgomery.changelog_2026_3: v2026.3: Group F (Police) fully detailed from SPD. All three public safety groups (E, F, G) now complete. Formula: 2.4% x 36 years, max 86.4%. DRSP (not DROP): age 46/25yrs, participant-directed Fidelity.

fcpp_plans_falls_church.description: City of Falls Church Basic and Police Pension Plans — 2 DB plans (Basic: 1.8% multiplier, Rule of 90; Police: 2.8%/3.0% split multiplier, 2 tiers by hire date)
fcpp_plans_falls_church.changelog_2026_2: v2026.2: Section 5.04 COLA (half CPI-U, 4% cap). TR25-42 annuity amendment (8 to 5 options, eff. May 2026). Full formula, eligibility, contributions, disability from plan document.
fcpp_plans_falls_church.changelog_2026_3: v2026.3 (OM-21): Police plan COLA completed — determinationDate and measurementPeriod added (January 1 / September-to-September). COLA researchGap item removed; formula fully documented from actuarial valuation Exhibit F.

tsp_roth_conversion.description: TSP Roth in-plan conversion rules: eligibility, mechanics (min $500, max 26/yr), tax treatment, five-year rules, mandatory Roth catch-up, planning interactions (IRMAA, SRS, ladder strategy)

fers_srs_rules.description: FERS Special Retirement Supplement (SRS) rules: eligibility, formula (SS estimate x FERS years/40), earnings test, COLA (none), tax treatment, planning interactions

csrs_retirement_rules.description: CSRS retirement system rules: tiered formula (1.5%/1.75%/2.0%), eligibility, 80% cap, sick leave credit, survivor annuity (55%), CSRS Offset, voluntary contributions, special category (LEO/FF), COLA (full CPI)

fegli_rates.description: FEGLI life insurance: Basic/Option A/B/C coverage, premium rates by age band, Extra Benefit schedule, retirement reduction elections (75%/50%/No Reduction), post-retirement rates

fehb_retirement_eligibility.description: FEHB retirement eligibility: 5-year rule, who can continue, premium mechanics, Medicare coordination (Part A/B, FEHB as secondary), TCC (COBRA equivalent)

sdcera_plans.description: SDCERA (San Diego County) — 9-tier defined benefit pension system under 1937 Act, covering General and Safety members

filing_status_thresholds.update_frequency: annual (January, after IRS Rev. Proc. published)
filing_status_thresholds.description: Consolidated filing-status-dependent thresholds for all five IRS filing statuses. Tax brackets, standard deductions, IRMAA, IRA limits, SS taxation, SALT caps. Includes 10-year history (2016-2025).
filing_status_thresholds.source: IRS Rev. Proc. 2025-32, CMS CMS-8089-N, SSA, IRS Notice 2025-67, OBBBA P.L. 119-21
filing_status_thresholds.changelog_2026_2: v2026.2: Fixed 2026 HoH bracket thresholds per Rev. Proc. 2025-32 Table 2.

county_property_tax_sc.description: County-level property tax rates, veteran exemptions, and application info for top retirement counties in South Carolina (Beaufort, Charleston, Horry, Greenville).

county_property_tax_tn.description: County-level property tax rates, veteran exemptions, and application info for top retirement counties in Tennessee (Williamson, Knox, Hamilton).

county_property_tax_ga.description: County-level property tax rates, veteran exemptions, and application info for top retirement and military counties in Georgia (Chatham, Cobb, Liberty).

leo_premium_pay.description: LEO premium pay rules: LEAP (25% availability pay for criminal investigators) and AUO (10-25% administratively uncontrollable overtime). Includes eligible series, rate tiers, retirement treatment, and position-to-premium mapping.

fers_computation_rules.description: FERS annuity computation formulas: standard, enhanced, special category (SC), MRA+10 age reduction, disability retirement (first 12 months/after/recomputation at 62), CSRS-to-FERS transfer dual component, and congressional employee rules.

county_property_tax_california.description: County-level property tax rates and veteran exemptions for California (Prop 13 constrained)

foreign_service_retirement_rules.description: Foreign Service retirement systems (FSRDS, FSRDS Offset, FSPS): benefit formulas, eligibility, COLA rules, survivor benefits, annuity supplement, contribution rates, transfer provisions, and FERS comparison
foreign_service_retirement_rules.source: 3 FAM 6110-6180, Foreign Service Act of 1980, 22 U.S.C. Chapter 52
foreign_service_retirement_rules.changelog_1_0: Initial release. Three systems with complete formula coverage, 94-check validation suite.

federal_retirement_systems_index.description: Comprehensive catalog of all federal/uniformed services retirement systems: FERS, CSRS, Foreign Service, CIA, TVA, Federal Reserve, judicial, all 8 uniformed services, 6(c) special category positions, and defined contribution plans
federal_retirement_systems_index.source: GAO AIMD-96-6, CRS R47084, 5 U.S.C. Chapters 83-84, 22 U.S.C. Chapter 52, 10 U.S.C. Chapter 71
federal_retirement_systems_index.changelog_1_0: Initial release. Master index covering all known federal retirement systems with 118-check validation suite.

fers_eligibility_rules.description: FERS retirement eligibility: MRA schedule by birth year (13 bands, 55-57), all immediate retirement pathways (MRA+30, 60+20, 62+5, MRA+10), special category (LEO/FF/ATC), VERA/VSIP early retirement, deferred and disability eligibility, FEHB 5-year rule.

fers_service_credit_rules.description: Federal retirement service credit: civilian deposit and redeposit (FERS/CSRS), military service buyback, sick leave conversion formula with OPM 2087-hour reference table, and 42 years of Treasury interest rate history (1985-2026).

fs_pay_tables.description: Foreign Service (FS) base pay tables by grade (FP-1 through FP-9) and step (1-14), 2016-2026. Companion to foreign-service-retirement-rules.json for High-3 salary computation.

lacera_plans_los_angeles.description: LACERA (Los Angeles County) retirement plan data — 9 plans covering general (A/B/C/D/E/G) and safety (A/B/C) members

calstrs_plans_california.description: California State Teachers Retirement System (CalSTRS) DB Program — 990K members, educator-only pension, 2 tiers (2%@60 Classic/2%@62 PEPRA). Non-SS-covered. 2% simple COLA + SBMA 85% purchasing power floor.

trs_plans_texas.description: Teacher Retirement System of Texas (TRS) — ~2M members, 6 tiers by enrollment/grandfathered status. Non-SS-covered. Formula: 2.3% x service x FAS. No automatic COLA — legislative only. Member+employer each 8.25%.

strs_ohio_plans.description: State Teachers Retirement System of Ohio (STRS Ohio) — ~543K members. Non-SS-covered. Formula: 2.2% x service x 5-yr FAS. Board-approved COLA via SBP (1.5% FY2026, 1.6% FY2027). 14% member+employer. 3 plan types (DB/DC/Combined).

frs_plans_florida.description: Florida Retirement System (FRS) Pension Plan — ~1.1M members. SS-covered. 2 tiers (pre/post July 2011). 4 membership classes (Regular 1.6%, Special Risk 3.0%, Senior Mgmt 2.0%, Elected Officers 3.0-3.4%). Tier 1 COLA prorated 3%; Tier 2 no COLA. DROP, HIS supplement.

nyslrs_plans_new_york.description: New York State and Local Retirement System (NYSLRS) — ERS (6 tiers) and PFRS (5 tiers, no T4). 1.2M members. SS-covered. COLA: 50% CPI, 1-3%, first $18K. Tier 6 income-based contributions 3-6%. 2024 law: FAE changed from 5 to 3 years for Tier 6.

nystrs_plans_new_york.description: New York State Teachers Retirement System (NYSTRS) — 460K members, educator-only. SS-covered. 6 tiers; Tier 4 largest (59%), Tier 6 36% growing. COLA: 50% CPI 1-3% first $18K (same law as NYSLRS). Tier 6 FAS = 5 years (NYSTRS did NOT get the 2024 3-year FAE law). 101.5% funded.

calpers_plans_california.description: California Public Employees Retirement System (CalPERS) — representative benefit formula set: Classic Misc 2%@55, Classic Misc 2%@60, PEPRA Misc 2%@62, Classic Safety 3%@50, PEPRA Safety 2.7%@57. Includes COLA (2-5%), PPPA thresholds, PEPRA compensation caps, vesting, and funding status.

copera_plans_colorado.description: Colorado PERA — 5-division hybrid DB pension (State, School, Local Government, Judicial, DPS). Uniform 2.5% × HAS formula; retirement eligibility by HAS Table tier. Includes AAP shared-risk mechanism, 1.5% base AI, per-division funded ratios, SB 18-200 reform structure.

md_srps_plans_maryland.description: Maryland State Retirement and Pension System (SRPS) — statewide DB pension covering teachers, state employees, corrections officers (CORS), law enforcement (LEOPS), state police (MSPRS), judges, and legislators. ACPS (1.2%/1.8% formula) and RCPB (1.5%) tiers; Rule of 90 retirement; investment-dependent COLA (2.5%/1%). ~420K members, ~$70B portfolio.

dcrb_plans_dc.description: DC Retirement Board (DCRB) — Police Officers and Firefighters Retirement Plan (3 tiers: 2.5%/3.0% formula, 20-25yr service) and Teachers Retirement Plan (2.0% post-1996). Covers MPD officers, FEMS firefighters, and DCPS ET-classified teachers. Most DC government workers are on FERS (see federal data files). Federal/DC benefit split for pre-July 1, 1997 service.

opers_plans_ohio.description: Ohio Public Employees Retirement System (OPERS) — 1M+ members. Non-SS-covered. Traditional Pension Plan Groups A/B/C (2.2%/2.5% formula). Member-Directed (DC) and Combined (closed Jan 2022). LE/PS separate tiers. CPI-W COLA cap 3%.

ers_plans_texas.description: Employees Retirement System of Texas (ERS) — ~140K active / ~125K retired. SS-covered. Groups 1-3: DB (2.3% x service x HAS; FAS 36/48/60 months). Group 4 (hired 9/1/2022+): cash balance, 6% member / 150% state match, 4-7% annual interest. Rule of 80 eligibility. LECOS supplemental fund.
